name: User Local, Inc.
summary: User Local, Inc. develops various analysis tools for website creators and marketers. The company engages in the research and development of big data analysis systems. It also provides Web marketing support tools under the User Insight name; social media analysis tools under the Social Insight name; and media analysis tools under the Media Insight name, as well as manages artificial intelligence chat bot. In addition, the company offers text mining, emotion and face recognition, future prediction, and automotive image processing AI services, as well as automatic summarization tools, AI comment systems, personal information anonymization filters, and duplicate aggregation tools. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
